name: Repo Maintainer Tentacle
description: LLM-guided repository self-iteration through explicit OAuth grants, PR drafts, and PR publishing.

brain.prompt: Inspect repository health, compare docs/code/tests, prepare the smallest useful branch plan, and return PR-ready evidence only inside an explicit grant boundary.
brain.feedback_contract: Return mode, branch plan, draft PR data, publish report, checks, guardrails, and whether OAuth is required.

skills.description: Prepare safe repository improvement work without pushing directly to main.

tools.description: Inspect local repo health and relevant manifests.
tools.output: git status, current branch, detected manifests

tools.description: Read GitHub issues and workflow runs when gh is available.
tools.output: JSON status with issues and runs

tools.description: Check local Codex CLI OAuth/API-key readiness without exposing secrets.
tools.output: JSON status for Codex CLI, auth cache presence, gh auth, and optional live check

tools.description: Generate candidate patch queue from issues, CI, or the current goal.
tools.output: patch queue path and candidate count

tools.description: Write branch plan and pull request draft data under .octopus/self-iteration.
tools.output: branch plan path and PR draft path

tools.description: Use the local Codex CLI login/API-key context to prepare a repository maintenance report.
tools.output: Codex maintenance prompt, report, logs, and JSON metadata under .octopus/self-iteration

permission.reason: Runs the local Codex CLI with the user's existing login or access-token context; Octopus does not store the secret.

tools.description: Publish a draft pull request through gh after an explicit Octopus OAuth grant.
tools.input: workspace root, repository, branch, title, PR body file
tools.output: publish report path, branch, and PR URL when created

surfaces.description: Prompt that turns repo health signals into PR-ready feed.
Repository and GitHub tool descriptions, inputs, outputs, and call contracts.
Editable local repo, GitHub, OAuth, and PR draft adapters.
Checks and constraints that keep self-iteration grant-bound.

checks: OCTOPUS_PR_DRY_RUN=1 tools/publish_pr.sh $(mktemp -d) dangoZhang/Octopus octopus/improve-usability 'Improve usability' README.md
constraints: Publish PRs only after an explicit grant and user-run command.
Do not print or persist Codex access tokens or auth cache contents.
